message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 30
  BoxPadding 15
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
}

actor User
participant Wellbie
participant Quis
participant UserDigitalProfile
participant Challanges
participant Achievements
participant Points
participant Rewards

User -> Wellbie

box "general use case" #FFFFFF
  Wellbie -> Quis : Sets a Goal
  Quis -> UserDigitalProfile : Select from list
  UserDigitalProfile -> Challanges : creates\nor accepts
  Challanges -> Achievements : Confirms with\nML and\nGarmin watch\nactivity logs
end box

box "rewards from sponsors" #FFFFFF
  Achievements -> Points : Collects\nconfirmed
  Points -> Rewards : Spends to\na bonus
end box

@enduml
